changes.commit: **3D Projectors**: Now default to 2D view with the ability to switch to 3D view.
**Graph Panel] Add shift for selecting all junction in junction group. - [Graph Panel**: Improve junction group visibility.
**Preview Panel**: Fix crash when switching preview channel with hotley.
**Preview Panel**: Fix crash when switching preview channel with hotley.
**VectorBox] Add support for vector array creation by setting one element into an array. - [VectorBox**: Add support for vector array modification.
